prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Which Python source files across the `numpy/numpy` and `scipy/scipy` repositories still contain references to `numpy.distutils`? Include files that import it, contain vendored code from it, or reference it in help text.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the python-ml-stack fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Which Python source files across the `numpy/numpy` and `scipy/scipy` repositories still contain references to `numpy.distutils`? Include files that import it, contain vendored code from it, or reference it in help text.
